Trump Nominates Kevin Warsh to Succeed Jerome Powell as Fed Chair** | YES | HIGH confidence[1][2][3]

President Trump announced Kevin Warsh, former Fed Governor, as his nominee to replace Jerome Powell when Powell's chair term expires in May 2026, ending months of speculation via a Truth Social post[1][3]. Warsh faces a Senate confirmation hearing Tuesday, which could influence U.S. monetary polic
